name: Fondue a La Old Swiss House Lucerne
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the mixing pan with garlic.
2. Use two types of Swiss cheese: grate 150 grams each per person of Emmenthaler and Gruyere.
3. Add 1 glass of dry white wine.
4. Sprinkle pepper, salt, and nutmeg over the cheese.
5. Heat over low flame and stir gently with a wooden spoon until the cheese is completely melted.
6. Gradually add 1 tablespoon of corn flour to the cheese while increasing the heat slightly.
7. Continue stirring until the mixture reaches a creamy sauce consistency.
8. Before serving, place the pan back on a small flame and add 1 glass of kirsch (cherry liqueur) to the cheese sauce.
